```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: false

#qa1<-"Wiener_Einführung.pdf"
load("margindb.RData")
qa<-list(litKI="Wiener_Einführung.pdf",
nietzsche=c("nietzsche, kga 3-1, geburt d tragödie.pdf","nietzsche briefe ggl.pdf"),
textur=c("2 - Behmenburg, Lena - Das Weben von Texten und Texturen.pdf","langlois-2019-distributed-intelligence-silk-weaving-and-the-jacquard-mechanism.pdf","07_Munk+Rosing.pdf")) # margin note studyset 
qa<-list(litKI=c("Wiener_Einführung.pdf","Foerster_Ethik+und+Kybernetik+zweiter+Ordnung_m Kopie.pdf"),
nietzsche=c("nietzsche, kga 3-1, geburt d tragödie.pdf","nietzsche briefe ggl.pdf","Günther 2008, Der Wettkampf.pdf","Nietzsche, Homers Wettkampf, KGW III.2"),
textur=c("2 - Behmenburg, Lena - Das Weben von Texten und Texturen.pdf","langlois-2019-distributed-intelligence-silk-weaving-and-the-jacquard-mechanism.pdf","07_Munk+Rosing.pdf",
"3 - Julia Abel, Andreas Blödom, Michael Scheffel - Ambivalenz und Kohärenz, Einleitung.pdf"))
```



```{r,get-anno}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true
#| results: "asis"
#| output: false
#| message: false

# load("margindb.RData")
# qa<-margindb$qa
# margindb<-margindb$dbsub
#qa<-margindb$qa
print("_vars")
#qa1
quietly <- function(expr) {
  withCallingHandlers(
    {
      invisible(capture.output(
        result <- eval.parent(substitute(expr))
      ))
      result
    },
   message = function(m) invokeRestart("muffleMessage"),
   warning = function(w) invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
  )
}
quietly2 <- function(expr) {
  tf <- tempfile()
  zz <- file(tf, open = "wt")
  sink(zz)
  sink(zz, type = "message")

  on.exit({
    sink(type = "message")
    sink()
    close(zz)
  })

  eval.parent(substitute(expr))
}
# qa1<-list(nietzsche=c("nietzsche, kga 3-1, geburt d tragödie.pdf","nietzsche briefe ggl.pdf","Günther 2008, Der Wettkampf.pdf","Nietzsche, Homers Wettkampf, KGW III.2.pdf"))
# qa2<-list(nietzsche=c("nietzsche, kga 3-1, geburt d tragödie.pdf","nietzsche briefe ggl.pdf","Günther 2008, Der Wettkampf.pdf","Nietzsche, Homers Wettkampf, KGW III.2"))
library(purrr)
library(stringi)
qa2<-enc2utf8(unlist(qa1))
cat("\nutf8\n")
qa2
qa2 <- stri_trans_nfc(qa2)

library(stringi)
table<-margindb
table$doc <- stri_trans_nfc(table$doc)
library(bib2df)
m1<-table$doc%in%qa2
sum(m1)
f<-list.files(pattern="bib")
#qa1<-qa
b<-grep(names(qa1),f)
#bibdf<-bib2df(f[b])
# invisible(
#   capture.output({
#     bibdf <- bib2df::bib2df(f[b])
#   })
# )
#bibdf <- quietly2(bib2df::bib2df(f[b]))
bibdf<-bib2df(f[b])
bibdf$NOTE<-gsub("\\\\","",bibdf$NOTE)
save(bibdf,file="bibdf.RData")
qu<-unlist(qa2)
m2<-qu%in%bibdf$NOTE
kdf<-margindb[m1,]
kdf<-kdf[order(kdf$doc,kdf$spage),]
kdf<-data.frame(kdf[,c("doc","notes","comment","spage")],row.names = NULL)
kdf$notes<-gsub("[\r\n|]","(..)",kdf$notes)
kdf$comment<-gsub("[\r\n|]"," (..)",kdf$comment)
kdf$comment<-gsub("(http)",'<a href="\\1 " target="_blank">\\1dum</a>',kdf$comment)
#kdf$comment<-gsub("(http.+) ?",'<a href="\\1 " target="_blank">\\1 </a>',kdf$comment)
kdf<-kdf[!(is.na(kdf$notes)&(is.na(kdf$comment)|kdf$comment=="")),]
du<-unique(kdf$doc)
bibdf$NOTE <- stri_trans_nfc(bibdf$NOTE)
#save(bibdf,file="bibdf.RData")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true
#| results: "asis"
#| output: true
#| message: false

library(kableExtra)
for(k in 1:length(du)){
  p<-du[k]
  p
  m3<-kdf$doc==p
  #cat(bibdf$NOTE,"\n")
  #cat(p,"\n")
  # m4<-grep(p,bibdf$NOTE)
  #m4<-p==bibdf$NOTE)
  m4<-p==bibdf$NOTE
  c<-bibdf$BIBTEXKEY[m4]
  c<-c[!is.na(c)]
  #cat("c:",c,"\n")
  page<-gsub("[\r\n ] ","",kdf$spage[m3])
  if(length(m3)>0){
    if(sum(grepl("[a-z]",kdf$notes[m3]))>0){
  df<-data.frame(page=paste0("",page,""),note=kdf$notes[m3],comment=kdf$comment[m3])
  dup<-duplicated(df$note)
  df<-df[!dup,]
  if(sum(m4,na.rm=T)==0){
    m5<-grep("#cite",df$comment)
    c<-gsub(".*#cite_(.+)__.*","\\1",df$comment[m5])
    c<-unique(c)
    # print("c m40")
    # print(c)
  }
  
cat(paste0("\n#### annotations: ",p,"\n"))
cat(paste0("\npaper: @",c,"\n"))

cat(knitr::kable(df,row.names = F,booktabs = F, format="html") %>% 
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), 
                    full_width = T) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "2cm") %>% 
  column_spec(2, width = "7cm") %>% 
  column_spec(3, width = "4cm"))
}
  }
}
```
